sentences.arabic: كَانَ الشِّعْرُ الْعَرَبِيُّ قَدِيمًا هُوَ لِسَانَ الْعَرَبِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska poezija je u davna vremena bila glas Arapa.
sentences.translationEn: In ancient times, Arabic poetry was the voice of the Arabs.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ الشُّعَرَاءُ قَصَائِدَ طَوِيلَةً عَنِ الْجَمَالِ وَالْأَخْلَاقِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesnici su pisali dugačke pjesme o ljepoti i moralu.
sentences.translationEn: Poets wrote long poems about beauty and morals.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الشَّاعِرُ كَلِمَاتٍ رَقِيقَةً لِيَعْبَرَ عَنْ مَشَاعِرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesnik koristi nježne riječi kako bi izrazio svoja osjećanja.
sentences.translationEn: The poet uses delicate words to express his feelings.

sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ النَّاسُ هَذِهِ الْأَبْيَاتِ فِي الْمَجَالِسِ الْعَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi čitaju ove stihove na javnim okupljanjima.
sentences.translationEn: People read these verses in public gatherings.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ الْجَمِيعُ سَمَاعَ الْقَافِيَةِ الْجَمِيلَةِ فِي كُلِّ بَيْتٍ.
sentences.translation: Svi vole slušati lijepu rimu u svakom stihu.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone loves hearing the beautiful rhyme in every verse.
